items.claim: Gibson suffered a brutal knockout in his fight against Orici Lang eight months ago.
items.quote: that's like a fight changing uh knockout that he took against Orici Lang back what was that, eight months ago.

items.claim: Gibson is declining rapidly in performance after starting out okay in recent fights.
items.quote: he starts out okay and then he's just absolutely falling off a cliff.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is physically smaller than his UFC listed height, measuring closer to 5 foot 5 or 5 foot 4.
items.quote: He's more like a 5 foot five, 5 foot4 kind of guy.

items.claim: Gibson is 38 years old and struggling with the physicality of weight cuts at his age.
items.quote: Gibson has kind of shown that like at the ripe bold age of what 38 years old like I don't think those weight cuts are getting any easier.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has skills in all aspects of the game and looks like a legitimate prospect.
items.quote: Usain looks like the real deal to me. The guy looked good. He's got skills in all aspects of the game.
